TSN.5.HD.ca2.title: The Pitch
TSN.5.HD.ca2.subtitle: The Vision
TSN.5.HD.ca2.description: After retiring from international soccer, Diana Matheson sets out to build what has never existed: a professional women's soccer league in Canada; moving between past and present, tracing the resilience of women who succeeded despite a system that worked against them and the urgency that drives the league's creation; as Matheson and her team take the first steps toward making the league real, they confront skepticism, institutional resistance, and the risk of starting from nothing.

TSN.5.HD.ca2.subtitle: The Race to Six
TSN.5.HD.ca2.description: After her retirement, Diana Matheson co-founded the first professional women's soccer league in Canada. This documentary follows two years of fighting against institutional skepticism: an inspiring story of resilience to change the rules of the game.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Harlequins v Exeter Chiefs
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Harlequins v Exeter Chiefs (Kick-off 4.00pm). Coverage of the match from Twickenham Stoop. These two sides last met in the reverse fixture back in October when the Chiefs came away with a 38-0 victory. Exeter were already 24-0 up at half-time before scoring another unanswered 14 points to claim the dominant victory.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Saracens v Gloucester Rugby
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Saracens v Gloucester Rugby (Kick-off 6.30pm). Coverage of the match from StoneX Stadium. The reverse fixture at the end of December saw Saracens come away from Gloucester with a hard-fought 30-21 win. The game was on a knife-edge at half-time with the score 17-14 to Saracens before two tries in the space of six minutes took the game away from Gloucester and earnt the hosts an important victory.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.East.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.East.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.East.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.West.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: All the Dogs' Names
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy, Archie meets Sunny's father; Walt makes Dylan an unsatisfactory new offer.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Valerie Bonds With the Cast
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Valerie offers to take her co-stars to lunch; Valerie learns why Juna is such a paparazzi favorite; Mark's daughter asks Valerie for a ride to school.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Valerie Stands Up for Aunt Sassy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Valerie is concerned about her character's lines; Valerie rethinks her impulsive decision to adopt a puppy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Porky Pig and Daffy Duck become Earth's only hope when their antics at the local bubble-gum factory uncover a secret alien mind-control plot. Faced with cosmic odds, they must save their town and the world while not driving each other totally loony.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sarah Silverman: We Are Miracles
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic performs in front of an intimate audience at Los Angeles' Largo nightclub.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy Rich Asians
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Lil Rel Howery: Live in Crenshaw
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Known for his storytelling and impressions of the many characters he encounters in life, Lil Rel Howery draws on his personal experiences and discusses topics such as returning to his hometown of Chicago for his uncle's funeral.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem

On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant

While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Through countless setbacks, Joel reinvents himself with a return to his roots and a residency at Madison Square Garden.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Christy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wilson

She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sex and the City 2

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: En un mundo de ambiciones y excesos, Marty persigue un sueño que nadie toma en serio: convertirse en un ícono del tenis de mesa. Con un talento innato y una personalidad magnética, su obsesiva búsqueda de éxito y reconocimiento lo lleva a una espiral de fama y caos que lo arrastran a su redención.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Los conflictos entre Rue, Cassie y Nate se intensifican. Bishop acusa a Rue de causar problemas por dondequiera que pasa. Nate tiene que lidiar con las duras críticas de Cassie, quien le expresa su decepción.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: John McClane viaja a Rusia en busca de su hijo y descubre que es un agente de la CIA con una misión. Ambos deben superar sus diferencias para proteger a un testigo y evitar una catástrofe.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Tras establecer límites con sus padres, Katie toma una decisión sobre su matrimonio con Archie, quien, por su parte, habla con Sunny sobre el futuro. Luego, mientras lidia con la independencia de Katie, Greg se prepara para despedirse de su semestre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: NuNet insta a Valerie a hacer una declaración pública en defensa de la IA. Valerie reflexiona sobre su futuro, con o sin How's That?!

TNT.HD.us2.title: National Treasure
TNT.HD.us2.description: Historian and code-breaker Ben Gates (Nicolas Cage) has been searching his whole life for a rumored treasure dating back to the creation of the United States. Joining an expedition led by fellow treasure hunter Ian Howe (Sean Bean), Gates finds an ice-locked Colonial ship in the Arctic Circle that contains a clue linking the treasure to the Declaration of Independence. But when Howe betrays him, Gates has to race to get to the document ahead of his so-called colleague.

TNT.HD.us2.title: Con Air

Along with Diamond Dog (Ving Rhames) and Baby-O (Mykelti Williamson), genius serial killer Cyrus "The Virus" Grissom (John Malkovich) unleashes a violent escape plot in mid-flight. Secretly working with U.S. Marshall Vince Larkin (John Cusack), Poe tries to foil Grissom's plan.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Angels in the Outfield
truTV.HD.us2.description: Foster kid Roger (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) loves the Anaheim Angels, even though they're the worst team in the major leagues. His estranged dad promises to reunite the family if the Angels make it to the World Series, so Roger decides to ask for some divine help and prays that his favorite team will turn things around. Soon, a real angel named Al (Christopher Lloyd) shows up in response to Roger's prayers, and Anaheim's hopeless coach (Danny Glover) is shocked to see his team on a winning streak.

While the park's mastermind, billionaire John Hammond (Richard Attenborough), assures everyone that the facility is safe, they find out otherwise when various ferocious predators break free and go on the hunt.

As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
AMC.HD.us2.description: John Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) is doing hard time in jail when his former boss, Col. Trautman (Richard Crenna), offers him a deal. If Rambo travels to Vietnam to try to find the American prisoners of war, his criminal record will be expunged. Rambo takes the reconnaissance assignment and agrees not to get involved in any of the action. However, when his Vietnamese lover, Co Bao (Julia Nickson), is killed by American forces, Rambo forgets his promise and takes matters into his own hands.

AMC.HD.us2.title: First Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam veteran and drifter John J. Rambo wanders into a small Washington town in search of an old friend, but is met with intolerance and brutality by the local sheriff, Will Teasle. When Teasle and his deputies restrain and shave Rambo, he flashes back to his time as a prisoner of war and unleashes his fury on the officers. He narrowly escapes the manhunt, but it will take his former commander to save the hunters from the hunted.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo: Last Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam War veteran John Rambo tries to find some semblance of peace by raising horses on a ranch in Arizona. He's also developed a special familial bond with a woman named Maria and her teenage granddaughter Gabriela. But when a vicious Mexican cartel kidnaps Gabriela, Rambo crosses the border on a bloody and personal quest to rescue her and punish those responsible.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Shooter
AMC.HD.us2.description: A top Marine sniper, Bob Lee Swagger, leaves the military after a mission goes awry and disappears without a trace. Swagger is coaxed back into service after high-profile government officials convince him to help thwart a plot against the President of the United States. Swagger realizes he has been betrayed and becomes the target of a nationwide manhunt. Instead of hiding, he seeks revenge against some of the most powerful and corrupt leaders in the free world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Unstoppable
AMC.HD.us2.description: When a massive, unmanned locomotive roars out of control, the threat is more ominous than just a derailment. The train is laden with toxic chemicals, and an accident would decimate human life and cause an environmental disaster. The only hope of bringing the train to a safe stop is in the hands of a veteran engineer (Denzel Washington) and a young conductor (Chris Pine), who must risk their lives to save those in the runaway's path. Inspired by true events.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Bourne Identity
AMC.HD.us2.description: A man, salvaged, near death, from the ocean by an Italian fishing boat. When he recuperates, the man suffers from total amnesia, without identity or background, except for a range of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistic skills and self-defense that speak of a dangerous past. He sets out on a desperate search-assisted by the initially rebellious Marie, to discover who he really is, and why he's being lethally pursued by assassins.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Bourne Supremacy
AMC.HD.us2.description: Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA; Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him -- but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead; vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landry, who is convinced he is guilty.

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: By Weeping Cross
AMC.HD.us2.description: Big Alice pulls into New Eden; Layton, Josie, and Liana sit stranded in the middle of nowhere, freezing to death, when a masked soldier appears; Alex finds herself in danger.

AMC.HD.us2.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

AMC.HD.us2.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
AMC.HD.us2.description: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Car Repair Secrets!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Save thousands on car repairs.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Aging Brain
AMC.HD.us2.description: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Get A Beautiful New Smile in 24 Hours
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Wellness Hour: Dr. Alvarez explores how Nuvia delivers a beautiful new smile in just 24 hours.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
AMC.HD.us2.description: Every 5 seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert you, restore your identity, and reimburse lost funds—leading the way in protecting families every day.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: If a Body Meets a Body
AMC.HD.us2.description: Curly is mentioned in a will.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Horses' Collars
AMC.HD.us2.description: Out West, the boys help an innocent maiden recover her inheritance.

AMC.HD.us2.title: U.S. Marshals
AMC.HD.us2.description: An airplane bearing gruff U.S. Marshal Sam Gerard (Tommy Lee Jones) crashes in the wilderness. On board the same flight is Mark Sheridan (Wesley Snipes), a federal prisoner accused of double murder, who escapes during the ensuing chaos, but not before rescuing several people from the wreckage. Gerard is ordered to hunt down the fugitive along with State Department agent John Royce (Robert Downey Jr.), and the two pursue Sheridan relentlessly, despite growing doubts about his guilt.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Enemy of the State
AMC.HD.us2.description: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. When a videotape of the murder ends up in the hands of Robert Clayton Dean (Will Smith), a labor lawyer and dedicated family man, he is framed for murder. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
AMC.HD.us2.description: Years before he becomes the tyrannical president of Panem, 18-year-old Coriolanus Snow remains the last hope for his fading lineage. With the 10th annual Hunger Games fast approaching, the young Snow becomes alarmed when he's assigned to mentor Lucy Gray Baird. Uniting their instincts for showmanship and political savvy, they race against time to ultimately reveal who's a songbird and who's a snake.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games
AMC.HD.us2.description: In what was once North America, the Capitol of Panem maintains its hold on its 12 districts by forcing them each to select a boy and a girl, called Tributes, to compete in a nationally televised event called the Hunger Games. Every citizen must watch as the youths fight to the death until only one remains. District 12 Tribute Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) has little to rely on, other than her hunting skills and sharp instincts, in an arena where she must weigh survival against love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
AMC.HD.us2.description: After arriving safely home from their unprecedented victory in the 74th Annual Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) discover that they must do a quick turnaround and begin a Victors Tour. As she and Peeta travel throughout the districts, Katniss senses a rebellion is stirring. However, President Snow (Donald Sutherland) proves that he is still very much in control when word comes of a cruel change in the rules for the upcoming 75th Hunger Games.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
AMC.HD.us2.description: Years before he becomes the tyrannical president of Panem, 18-year-old Coriolanus Snow remains the last hope for his fading lineage. With the 10th annual Hunger Games fast approaching, the young Snow becomes alarmed when he's assigned to mentor Lucy Gray Baird. Uniting their instincts for showmanship and political savvy, they race against time to ultimately reveal who's a songbird and who's a snake.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Snowpiercer
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Dominant Traits
AMC.HD.us2.description: Alex sabotages the track switch computer and, with Layton's help, escapes to town hall; Till gets the drop on Ace and uses his sniper rifle to save Layton and Alex from Rat; Melanie reveals the identity of Alex's biological father.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Snowpiercer
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Last Stop
AMC.HD.us2.description: Nima heads for Snowpiercer; Layton and the Tailies fight their way uptrain when Ruth is captured; Nima tries to cut a deal and runs to the rocket control room to initiate the launch sequence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Three Sappy People
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are phone repairmen who are mistaken for the psychiatrists in whose office they are working; the boys treat a playgirl.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games
AMC.HD.us2.description: In what was once North America, the Capitol of Panem maintains its hold on its 12 districts by forcing them each to select a boy and a girl, called Tributes, to compete in a nationally televised event called the Hunger Games. Every citizen must watch as the youths fight to the death until only one remains. District 12 Tribute Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) has little to rely on, other than her hunting skills and sharp instincts, in an arena where she must weigh survival against love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
AMC.HD.us2.description: After arriving safely home from their unprecedented victory in the 74th Annual Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) discover that they must do a quick turnaround and begin a Victors Tour. As she and Peeta travel throughout the districts, Katniss senses a rebellion is stirring. However, President Snow (Donald Sutherland) proves that he is still very much in control when word comes of a cruel change in the rules for the upcoming 75th Hunger Games.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
AMC.HD.us2.description: Following her rescue from the devastating Quarter Quell, Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) awakes in the complex beneath the supposedly destroyed District 13. Her home, District 12, has been reduced to rubble, and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) is now the brainwashed captive of President Snow (Donald Sutherland). At the same time, Katniss also learns about a secret rebellion spreading throughout all of Panem -- a rebellion that will place her at the center of a plot to turn the tables on Snow.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: Realizing the stakes are no longer just for survival, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) teams up with her closest friends, including Peeta (Josh Hutcherson), Gale (Liam Hemsworth) and Finnick for the ultimate mission. Together, they leave District 13 to liberate the citizens of war-torn Panem and assassinate President Snow, who's obsessed with destroying Katniss. What lies ahead are mortal traps, dangerous enemies and moral choices that will ultimately determine the future of millions.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Star Wars: A New Hope
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Imperial Forces -- under orders from cruel Darth Vader (David Prowse) -- hold Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) hostage, in their efforts to quell the rebellion against the Galactic Empire. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill) and Han Solo (Harrison Ford), captain of the Millennium Falcon, work together with the companionable droid duo R2-D2 (Kenny Baker) and C-3PO (Anthony Daniels) to rescue the beautiful princess, help the Rebel Alliance, and restore freedom and justice to the Galaxy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
AMC.HD.us2.description: The adventure continues in this "Star Wars" sequel. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill), Han Solo (Harrison Ford), Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) and Chewbacca (Peter Mayhew) face attack by the Imperial forces and its AT-AT walkers on the ice planet Hoth. While Han and Leia escape in the Millennium Falcon, Luke travels to Dagobah in search of Yoda. Only with the Jedi master's help will Luke survive when the dark side of the Force beckons him into the ultimate duel with Darth Vader (David Prowse).

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La detective; Sexo para heredar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ashly contrató a un detective para aclarar el crimen de su esposo, pero ella lo resolvió y no quiere pagarle. Andrea culpa a Ruby y a Margy de la muerte de su padre y se disputan la herencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de los años 40's
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Confianza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tamara intenta seducir al profesor de Matemáticas y piensa que él está de acuerdo. Aníbal se convierte en su capricho, pero su actitud desencadena la desconfianza en el matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me están comiendo los intereses
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Disna pide un préstamo y está presionada porque cada día paga más dinero y la deuda sigue creciendo. Paola, su nuera, busca a un supuesto prestamista y arrastra a Bertha para que se endeude.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Obsesión por títere; Semen en mi ojo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Daniela y José es autista, tiene problemas de comunicación, pero si le dan su títere favorito no para de hablar, sus padres no saben qué hacer. Valentina sufre una enfermedad sexual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Salvando a mi hija; Síndrome de Tourette
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis y Pierina tienen una hija con cáncer que no quiere someterse a quimioterapia. Además, Raúl padece el síndrome de Tourette y siente que su novia no lo comprende, solo lo hace sufrir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El hijo en mi vientre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra y Francisco sueñan con ser padres, pero caen en manos de un médico inescrupuloso que los estafa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé en venta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julissa es una adolescente embarazada que busca la forma de ocultar su situación. Una amiga la convence de vender a su bebé y así contactan a Sandra, quien está desesperada por ser madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Necesito a mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elisa está agobiada con la maternidad y descuida a su madre, que se pierde. Elisa se siente culpable de la situación y descubre cuánto necesita a su mamá.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Números que cambian vidas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Azul, una joven terapeuta que ayuda a muchos a lidiar con la violencia doméstica, es víctima del hostigamiento de su propia madre. Necesita probarse a sí misma que su labor es importante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Quiero justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paulina, ahora adolescente, canaliza toda la frustración de sus traumas infantiles con un comportamiento cargado de ira y agresividad. Tras años de abandono, su padre regresa, justo a tiempo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro en el rancho
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras sentar a varios de sus enemigos en una misma mesa, Gavino le propone a Diego un trato que no lo dejará indiferente. Circe busca la manera de salvar su negocio y matar a su padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Gritos y aberraciones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Héctor y Ruth compiten por un set de entretenimiento, ella los sorprende al expresar su emoción. Rodrigo y Fabiola buscan duplicar sus regalos, sus escapes son de antología.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Libertad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gregorio encuentra la valentía para escapar y denunciar violentos abusos laborales en la fábrica de su tío, pero pone en peligro su vida y la de sus padres, quienes tienen una gran deuda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me cansé de cuidar a mi suegra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elvira está muy estresada por cuidar a su suegra enferma tras un accidente que la mantiene en cama. Felipe, su pareja, se debate entre apoyar a su mamá y a su esposa. Sus hermanos lo presionan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se hace la loca para no trabajar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Enrique afirma que necesita internar a su esposa, quien está deprimida tras ser despedida. Señala que no cumple sus responsabilidades como madre y esposa, pese a recibir terapias psiquiátricas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Prensa secuestrada; Golpéame please
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Kelvin y Lorena son esposos y periodistas, ella lo envía a entrevistar a un narcotraficante, pero lo secuestran y casi muere. Sharon contrata a Pedro para que le pegue, pero todo sale mal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La diablita; Información expuesta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sufre de "bullying" y su madrastra la maquilla de muñeca diabólica para que huyan de ella. También, Danny es un usurero que da dinero en efectivo a cambio de usar las tarjetas de sus deudores.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy su cuñada, no su empleada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jade accede a un acuerdo con su hermano y cuñada para hacer los oficios del hogar y cuidar el bebé de la pareja, pero cree que ahora se están aprovechando. La jornada es de 12 horas diarias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Durmiendo con el enemigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula está desesperada y siente que su siempre amado Diego puede ser su salvación. No sabe que él espera su mejor momento para atacar. Gavino discute con Augusto y manda a eliminarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me dejaste colgada; Pancho y Romeo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ivandra queda colgada en una pared de escalar, cuando John deja de sujetarla, ella sufre daños en la muñeca. Los Pony Play se disfrazan y Pancho demanda a su esposa por maltrato animal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El bebé de la Bella Durmiente; Gaucho con las bolas grandes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis le paga a la esposa de Joel para alquilar su vientre, pero ella cae en coma. Por otro lado, Hilario es un gaucho que maneja con mucha destreza las boleadoras y los tambores.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de techno
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mensajero de amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danny y sus amigos deciden montar un negocio de mensajería especializada. Uno de sus primeros trabajos es un anuncio para Ana, pero se confunden y Pepe le entrega el mensaje equivocado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se hace la loca para no trabajar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Enrique afirma que necesita internar a su esposa, quien está deprimida tras ser despedida. Señala que no cumple sus responsabilidades como madre y esposa, pese a recibir terapias psiquiátricas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Poseído por mamá; Fish spa chupitos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Orlando pide que su hermano Neifry deje de comportarse como su madre fallecida. Carla se infecta con una bacteria al hacerse un tratamiento de belleza con peces, ahora exige que cierren el spa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La niña emoticones; Gimnasia y proteína
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana cubre con emoticones el rostro de su hija con síndrome de Down para subir sus fotos a las redes sociales. José exige que su esposa deje su obsesión con el fisicoculturismo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La justicia en tus manos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alexa no puede soportar que Darío le pida matrimonio a Camila y lo acusa de violación para meterlo a la cárcel. Sin embargo, gracias a Luisa hay pruebas de su mentira.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Donde nace el amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roscio es una mujer ambiciosa que decide entregar a su sobrina María Eugenia por dinero. Finalmente, Maru consigue un hogar donde hay amor, pero la inagotable codicia de su tía la persigue.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Caminar juntos por la vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El día de su boda, Alicia es arrollada por un automóvil y queda inválida. Su novio, Ricardo, la abandona, pero Gustavo llega a su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Felipa: Un grito por todas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Felipa sufre la brutal muerte de su hija, quien fue violada y asesinada. La joven delataba en su blog a los responsables de atacar a mujeres indefensas y la indiferencia de las autoridades.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Paola: Red de engaños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paola instala una app de citas y conoce a quien parece ser el hombre de sus sueños. Cuando descubre un video sexual suyo en internet se entera de que él es Jimmy, El gurú de la seducción.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Durmiendo con el enemigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula está desesperada y siente que su siempre amado Diego puede ser su salvación. No sabe que él espera su mejor momento para atacar. Gavino discute con Augusto y manda a eliminarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El arca de Noé
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sharon y Stephany deben armar el Arca de Noé para ganar una recámara infantil. Abraham y Alberto buscan el auto. Mónica y Carlos enfrentan un reto para llevarse dinero en efectivo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tictac tictac
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ofelia, enfocada en su labor como periodista, ha evadido una situación grave hasta que alguien le hace concientizar que debe detener a su mellizo, Patricio, quien es una persona peligrosa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy su cuñada, no su empleada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jade accede a un acuerdo con su hermano y cuñada para hacer los oficios del hogar y cuidar el bebé de la pareja, pero cree que ahora se están aprovechando. La jornada es de 12 horas diarias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por la herencia son capaces de todo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana asegura que sus hermanos quieren dejar morir a su madre, de 89 años, para quedarse con sus bienes. Su hijo y nuera, con quienes vive, no la tratan bien ni le brindan apoyo económico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Slime; La canción de la desgracia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un bebé muere por un "slime" que hicieron sus hermanos mientras estaban con su madrastra. Pide una canción biográfica para su matrimonio, el resultado es tan desastroso que se cancela la boda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Juan@ la loca; Cucaracha Challenge
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan está convencido de que es una mujer, su esposa, Liscar, le exige que vaya a terapia. Ariana tiene muchas cucarachas en su casa y como su amiga Claudia les tiene miedo, la demanda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se desvive por un chacal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandra está indignada porque su amiga Lizeth le debe tres meses de renta y ese dinero lo usa para satisfacer a su novio, Brayan. La confrontación aumenta cuando busca traer el chacal a casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El llamado de la justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino logra sembrar la desconfianza entre Circe y Diego. Ahora, ambos deben decidir qué harán para solucionar su situación. Augusto quiere aprovecharse de Diana, la hermana de Marlene.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Letra pequeña; Lo manejo yo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ivonne alteró la letra pequeña de un contrato para pagar menos, el prestamista lo descubre y la demanda. Acusan a Nicole de ser una mala influencia que arruina la carrera de un cantante urbano.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Historia de una prosti; Estafa universitaria
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mía estudia periodismo en una academia de Artes y Letras; allí, ganó un concurso literario, pero la organizadora no quiere entregarle el premio porque sostiene que su historia, su vida como prostituta, no es un buen ejemplo para los demás estudiantes. Michel se disfrazó de Kory y se presentó a un examen con la intención de ayudarla, pero fue descubierto y ambos fueron sancionados y expulsados del sistema educativo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Creer en el amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia vive con su padre desde que Luis la abandonó embarazada. Ya no cree en el amor, pero su hija Luisa quiere para ella un príncipe azul.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por la herencia son capaces de todo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana asegura que sus hermanos quieren dejar morir a su madre, de 89 años, para quedarse con sus bienes. Su hijo y nuera, con quienes vive, no la tratan bien ni le brindan apoyo económico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La doula; The sugar cake
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Su esposo quiere despedir a la doula por insistir en un embarazo al margen de médicos. Los celos y favoritismo de su novia y supervisora fueron la causa de que la tuviera que despedir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niño regalado; La entrometida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elizabeth confía en David para que sus hijos crucen la frontera, pero cuando el menor desaparece, ella pide la custodia del mayor. Andrea busca desalojar a su madrastra porque mató a su padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La bondad que hay que tus actos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Historias dramáticas de la vida diaria donde solo un milagro de la Virgen de Guadalupe puede ayudar a superar desafíos y problemas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cómo olvidar a Alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Historias dramáticas de la vida diaria donde solo un milagro de la Virgen de Guadalupe puede ayudar a superar desafíos y problemas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tres generaciones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para Adriana es difícil superar el divorcio de sus padres y se deja influenciar por malas compañías. Ella y su mamá se mudan a la casa de la abuela y las tres generaciones juntas enfrentan una nueva vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Romina: Una nueva vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Romina se lleva mal con su mamá y se muda con su papá quien le permite organizar una fiesta donde ella es abusada. Arrepentida, regresa con su madre y ambas cuentan su experiencia en un blog.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Asunción: Decidir una vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En un accidente, Asunción pierde a su bebé y ya no puede embarazarse de nuevo, como ginecóloga apoya a tres de sus pacientes a tomar decisiones determinantes sobre la vida y la maternidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El llamado de la justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino logra sembrar la desconfianza entre Circe y Diego. Ahora, ambos deben decidir qué harán para solucionar su situación. Augusto quiere aprovecharse de Diana, la hermana de Marlene.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los conocimientos necesarios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Felipe y Diana, esposos, desean lograr un súper escape para llevarse un automóvil. Los hermanos Andrés y Diana enfrentan el reto Trapitos al Sol para tener la opción de duplicar sus premios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Traición
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Abigail, stripper, despierta con un ultimátum, pero busca una oportunidad para vivir, al recordar una misteriosa despedida de soltero demasiado bien pagada por alguien anónimo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se desvive por un chacal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandra está indignada porque su amiga Lizeth le debe tres meses de renta y ese dinero lo usa para satisfacer a su novio, Brayan. La confrontación aumenta cuando busca traer el chacal a casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alquilé mi vientre, pero me enamoré
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edgar vive con su novia y, de común acuerdo, le propone a Carmen embarazarla a cambio de dinero. Ahora ella quiere convertirse en su esposa y lo presiona con la posibilidad de perder al bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dormir o comer; Amor a la muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Le dan somníferos para que se mantenga delgada y pueda modelar. Practicaba sexo extremo con la hermana de su esposa, ella muere y le deja una herencia que no puede cobrar por estar involucrado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Contagiando hepatitis; Fianza sin retorno
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Contagia de hepatitis A a su nuero y a un amigo, pero no a los nietos. Alina pierde su bote tras ponerlo como colateral de la fianza del hermano de su nuera Fary, ahora quiere que se lo pague.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hijo me odia por culpa de mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra y su madre están enfrentadas por la custodia de un niño de once años, hijo de Mayra. El pequeño no quiere saber nada de su mamá porque al parecer, la abuela lo manipula emocionalmente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Juego de engaños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de darle mucho amor a Circe, Diego le hace una oferta que no podrá cumplir. Ella asegura que pronto recuperarán la droga. Los colombianos están inquietos con el regreso de Joselito.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Todo por amor; Viviendo en un storage
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Maritza quiere internar a su padre en un ancianato porque tiene Alzheimer, pero el hombre no quiere porque se siente que está en perfecto estado y aún se siente útil. En otro caso, Kysha perdió su trabajo como seguridad en un hotel porque tenía orden de no dejar pasar a prostitutas y dejó pasar a Frida y a Cindy, sin saber que ellas estaban intentando conquistar a algún hombre adinerado de los que estaban hospedados.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Novio peligroso; Jengibre para el amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jay pasa dos años en prisión por un accidente que provocó su novia, pero ella lo culpa a él. Además, Yosaida usa jengibre como estimulante sexual con su pareja, pero se enferma gravemente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Mamá solita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando su marido la abandona junto a su hijo, ella termina como cantante de un centro nocturno y se enferma, por eso el niño viaja a Estados Unidos porque quiere encontrar a su padre para pedirle que regrese.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Matrimonio porno; Un problema de peso

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Castellón - Cádiz
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: CD Castellón buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: Cádiz CF intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

El Sporting intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar cuando encuentre salida; si controla el ritmo y acierta en la primera llegada, puede convertir el duelo en una noche de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cádiz - Deportivo
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Cádiz necesita un partido de mínimos: bloque compacto, control emocional y precisión en los centros para vivir cerca del área rival sin desordenarse. El Dépor, instalado en la zona alta, buscará mandar con ritmo y amplitud; si convierte su dominio en remates claros y gana la batalla de segundas jugadas, puede inclinar un duelo exigente en las áreas.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Das Magazin konzentriert sich auf den Fußball in Saudi-Arabien. Es bietet eine umfassende Berichterstattung über die nationale Liga, wichtige Spiele und Spieler sowie Entwicklungen im saudischen Fußball insgesamt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Brasilien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Campeonato Brasileiro (15. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Es werden alle Tore der höchsten brasilianischen Spielklasse, der 20 Teams umfassenden Série A, gezeigt. Darüber hinaus gibt es alles Wissenwerte zum Fußball in Brasilien, der viele Stars hervorbringt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Argentinien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Liga Profesional Apertura (Achtelfinale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Fußball aus der ganzen Welt mit allen Höhepunkten aus den internationalen Top-Ligen. In dieser Ausgebe von "scooore" werden die spektakulärsten und wichtigsten Szenen aus der höchsten Argentinischen Fußball-Liga gezeigt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Ekstraklasa
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Arka Gdynia – Gornik Zabrze (Nachholspiel, 31. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: 16 Vereine kämpfen um den polnischen Meistertitel. Nach der Hin- und Rückserie kommen die besten acht Teams in die Meisterschaftsrunde, in der nur noch ein Mal jeder gegen jeden gespielt wird. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: CA Rosario Central – Racing Club (Viertelfinale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf zur höchsten Spielklasse des argentinischen Fußballs: Die Primera División wurde 1985 als Nachfolger des Campeonato de Primera División und des Torneo Metropolitano gegründet. 24 Vereine sind in der Liga vertreten. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - GROUP C - MYANMAR vs VIETNAM - (REGU)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation's historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 1
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 8
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 317: Topuria vs Oliveira

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 810 - UFC Connected 'Unbreakable: Zahabi Bros, Ultimate Access: Sharabutdin Magomedov, My Fight Week: Baisangur Susrkaev, Locked In: Joe Mazzulla, My Moment: Zhang Weili
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Inside Montreal's iconic Tristar Gym, we explore how the Zahabi brothers forged an unbreakable bond, shaped by discipline, loyalty, and the love of combat. We go behind the scenes to explore Shara Bullet Magomedov's transition from the octagon to the silver screen in his upcoming role in a new film produced by music stars Hit-Boy and Alchemist

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 901 - Unbreakable: Tabatha Ricci, Ultimate Access: Justin Gaethje & Michael Chandler, My Moment: Alexander Volkanovski, Locked In: Paddy Pimblett
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Tabatha Ricci and Callum Walsh detail how their unbreakable bond is driving their success in combat sports. Justin Gaethje and Michael Chandler bring their competitive edge to the fairway. Alexander Volkanovski reflects on his unforgettable championship victory over Max Holloway at UFC 245. We lock in on Paddy Pimblett's favorite UFC superstars.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.
